title: Impact of NOAC Therapy on Ischemic Stroke Rates in Atrial Fibrillation

introduction.background: Atrial fibrillation is the most common sustained arrhythmia affecting 2-4% of adults globally.
introduction.gap: Real-world Turkish population data on NOAC effectiveness remains limited.
introduction.objective: To compare ischemic stroke rates among AF patients by anticoagulation strategy.

discussion.main_finding: NOAC therapy showed significantly lower stroke rates.
discussion.comparison_to_literature: Consistent with NOAC meta-analysis (Ruff et al., Lancet 2022).
limitations: Small sample size in no-anticoagulation group.
